description_long: This object is a compact, modern shotgun with a matte black metal body and a wooden grip. The frame features a series of elongated ventilation slots along the barrel shroud, likely for heat dissipation, and a Picatinny rail beneath the barrel for accessory mounting. The grip is ergonomically shaped and made of light-colored wood, contrasting with the rest of the gun's dark finish. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement. The overall design is robust and tactical, with a short barrel and a solid, utilitarian appearance. No visible stock is present, and the action mechanism appears integrated into the main body without external pumps or levers.
description: A compact, tactical shotgun with a black metal body, wooden grip, and ventilated barrel shroud. Features a Picatinny rail and lacks a visible stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, wooden grip, ventilated barrel shroud, and Picatinny rail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, symmetrical shroud, and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden grip, trigger guard, and the full length of the ventilated barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the wooden grip and the alignment of the barrel and shroud.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with elongated ventilation slots and a short, tactical profile
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
